failure_cases.what_failed: Alert fired on a normal patient during a vehicle bump.
failure_cases.why: SpO2 and HR were transiently inflated/deflated by motion artifacts before artifact filtering was applied, pushing the combined score past the threshold.
failure_cases.improvement: Gate alerts on SQI: suppress anomaly flag when hr_sqi or spo2_sqi < 0.5. Additionally apply artifact cleaning before passing data to the detector.

failure_cases.what_failed: Detector triggered on a normal patient with no obvious artifact.
failure_cases.why: Gaussian noise in the generator occasionally pushes multiple vitals to their plausible extremes simultaneously, creating a rare but valid-looking anomalous multi-variate pattern.
failure_cases.improvement: Require co-occurrence: only alert if anomaly is flagged in >=2 consecutive windows AND MEWS >= 2 simultaneously (alert hysteresis).
